query:
INSERT INTO performers (name, performerType, imageUrl, bio) VALUES
('Violet Myers', 'Rising Star', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/LOhYCrgFQllbhbLW.png', 'Curvy Latina performer known for her natural beauty and captivating performances.'),
('Abella Danger', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/JaOcaTTgCDfiOyGH.png', 'Athletic powerhouse and industry legend with striking features and incredible energy.'),
('Riley Reid', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/ofHBETVBHZDeMhSS.png', 'Petite performer and industry icon known for her girl-next-door charm and versatility.'),
('Lana Rhoades', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/oPHaypuKCvkojzun.png', 'Stunning performer with piercing blue-green eyes and captivating presence.'),
('Cherie DeVille', 'MILF', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/ITpmlXgfjMrGPbKa.png', 'Sophisticated blonde performer known for her elegance and experience.')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
imageUrl = VALUES(imageUrl),
performerType = VALUES(performerType),
bio = VALUES(bio);
